overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character with a green backpack through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The scene transitions from a covered sidewalk with blue neon accents to an open plaza dominated by large digital billboards and reflective wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon-lit storefronts

events.description: pedestrian in white hoodie passes by the camera on the left
approaching open plaza area as covered walkway ends

agents.ego_description: character with green backpack walking steadily along the covered sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white hoodie and red pants walking past the camera
pedestrian in brown coat walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: concrete overhang covering the sidewalk with red support pillars
building facade featuring bright blue neon linear lighting
large illuminated advertising screens displaying colorful graphics
concrete pavement with reflective wet surface showing neon reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered urban sidewalk at night, following a character with a green backpack. A pedestrian in a white hoodie passes by closely on the left, while another pedestrian walks ahead in the distance. The environment features a building with distinctive blue neon trim on the left and large digital billboards visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with digital advertising towers

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with prominent digital billboards

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the open plaza toward the digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat continuing to walk ahead toward the intersection

entered.detail: metal public benches arranged along the sidewalk edge
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street
illuminated traffic signals showing green for vehicles

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by massive digital billboards and futuristic glass architecture. The character continues walking past street benches toward a pedestrian overpass bridge in the distance. Traffic lights are visible on the right as vehicles pass on the adjacent multi-lane road, while the covered walkway from the previous segment recedes behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit urban walkway into a vast, open futuristic plaza. It begins on a covered sidewalk at night, trailing a character with a green backpack as a pedestrian in a white hoodie passes closely on the left. As the character moves forward, the blue neon trim of the adjacent building gives way to a widening vista of massive digital billboards and glass architecture. The scene then expands into a wide plaza, leaving the covered walkway behind while passing street benches and traffic lights beside a busy multi-lane road. Finally, the camera continues its forward trajectory toward a distant pedestrian overpass bridge under the glow of the city's digital displays.
